title: hieracium sparsum subsp. lailanum
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. lailanum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its distinctive foliage and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium sparsum subsp. lailanum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. It is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and also used in traditional folk medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
